name: Neon Blaze
desc: Bold red/pink/blue per-player Player Info, Neon Blue background, board spins on triples/doubles/tons.

name: Neon Blue
desc: Same proven Player Info layout, recolored into an all-blue palette (electric cyan, indigo, turquoise, deep navy) over the Neon Blue background, blue triple/double glow. Each player gets a slightly different blue shade, no other colors mixed in.

name: Neon Green
desc: Full Player Info sizing (same layout as Neon Blaze) in a green/teal/lime palette, dark-tinted cards, green triple/double glow. Each player gets a slightly different green shade.

name: Black & Gold
desc: Same proven Player Info layout, recolored gold/amber/champagne on near-black tinted cards, heavier background darkening, gold triple glow. Each player gets a slightly different gold shade.

name: Silver
desc: Platinum/steel-grey per-player palette over the Neon Blue background, dark slate-tinted cards, white/steel-blue board glow. Each player gets a slightly different silver-blue shade.

name: Native
desc: Resets the target preset to plain default Autodarts look (no overrides).
